name: Neo Upper Energy
rules: You can't have more than 1 ACE SPEC card in your deck. | As long as this card is attached to a Pokémon, it provides Colorless Energy.  If this card is attached to a Stage 2 Pokémon, this card provides every type of Energy but provides only 2 Energy at a time. | ACE SPEC: You can't have more than 1 ACE SPEC card in your deck.
